source_recall.pass: find >= 1 of 3 ground truth orgs OR find >= 1 org with matching HCC specimens
source_recall.notes: Only 3 orgs in AminoChain for HCC — very thin commercial supply. Academic HCC biobanks (TCGA-LIHC cohort, CAIRO consortium, National Cancer Centre Singapore) are valid and important finds. Pipeline MUST NOT infer etiology (HBV/HCV/NASH) from org country alone — Ukraine-sourced specimens are predominantly HBV/HCV but this requires explicit documentation.

checks: every [documented] claim has verbatim quote + source ID
specimen counts cite a source, never estimated from training data
etiology (HBV/HCV/alcohol/NASH) not inferred from country of origin — must be explicitly annotated
Child-Pugh score not assumed — must be explicitly stated or labeled [not_stated]

pillar_coverage_per_source.pass: mean >= 40% of available fields filled per source

checks: every claim carries one of the 4 labels
every [verified]/[unverified] cites the [documented] facts it's based on
hypotheses state what verification was attempted
etiology labeled [not_stated] when absent rather than inferred
Child-Pugh labeled [not_stated] in all commercial biobank sources

score_calibration.pass: mean absolute error <= 1.0 per criterion vs expected range

must_flag_as_unknown.reason: HBV/HCV/NASH/alcohol status annotated in <10% of commercial specimens — must be flagged as critical gap
not annotated in any AminoChain HCC listing — requires direct clinical inquiry; system must not guess
only 4 confirmed matched pairs (BIOMEDICA CRO) — well below N=30 threshold; must be prominently flagged
transplant explant exclusion not systematically tracked — must confirm collection procedure per specimen
not in any public registry — requires direct inquiry

gap_honesty.fail: < 30% flagged (system presents incomplete picture as complete)

ground_truth_overlap.pass: at least 1 recommended source overlaps with AminoChain orgs

checks: no invented specimen counts — every N cites a source
no invented contacts — every email traces to paper/website/registry
no training-data fills for cost or biomarker data
etiology not fabricated from country-of-origin inference
Child-Pugh not asserted as available without explicit source

biomarker_availability.AFP: annotated at ProteoGenex only (6 specimens) — not available at scale
biomarker_availability.HBsAg: annotated at ProteoGenex only (4 specimens) — not systematically tracked
